scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run dry-run
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.local.toml
scripts.db:migrations:list:staging: npm run check:deploy-config:staging && wrangler d1 migrations list DB --remote --env staging --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.db:migrate:staging: npm run check:deploy-config:staging && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.db:migrations:list:production: npm run check:deploy-config:production && wrangler d1 migrations list DB --remote --env production --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.db:bootstrap:production: npm run db:assert-empty:production && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.db:migrate:production: npm run check:deploy-config:production && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.db:seed:production: npm run check:deploy-config:production && npm run db:seed:production:check && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env production --config wrangler.deploy.toml --file fixtures/production.local.sql
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run check:deploy-config:staging && wrangler deploy --minify --env staging --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.deploy:production: npm run check:deploy-config:production && wrangler deploy --minify --env production --config wrangler.deploy.toml
